articles.author: David J. Lynch
articles.title: Iran war spreading economic damage far beyond oil and gas markets - The Washington Post
articles.description: The conflict has hit Europe and Asia harder than the United States, with rising shipping costs and energy prices.
articles.content: Iranian missile and drone attacks have disrupted the flow of commerce through one of the global economys most critical hubs, paralyzing much of the ocean and air traffic that carries goods between As… [+68 chars]
